column1: # Greek alphabet — 24 letters, uppercase + lowercase. Same letters across
# Modern/Koine/Classical; the names + sound values are the classical
# (ancient) ones. `value` is the letter's numeral value (the milesian system:
# ϝ digamma=6 and ϟ qoppa=90 are archaic numeral-only letters, so ζ=7 and the
# jump κ→ρ skips 90 — that gap is authentic to antiquity).
# Columns: index / upper / lower / name (English) / name_el (Greek spelling,
# what TTS speaks) / sound (classical pronunciation) / value (numeral).
